ticket.title: Plan the Q3 milestone breakdown
ticket.description: Break the Q3 goal into milestones and tickets, with rough sequencing and the committed decisions that constrain them.

candidate_memory.link_reason: a committed decision that shapes sequencing

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the goal, personas, the SAML decision, and architecture; the stale roadmap is withheld (review_status), conventions (workspace) and changelog (release) are out of scope, Carol's note is private.

qa_agent.rationale: QA sees the decision, architecture, and changelog; project entries and conventions are out of scope; the stale roadmap is withheld; Carol's note is private.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the goal, personas, the decision, and conventions; the stale roadmap is withheld, codebase and release entries are out of scope, Carol's note is private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees goal, personas, decision, conventions, and changelog; the stale roadmap is withheld, codebase is out of scope, Carol's note is private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry including the stale roadmap (flagged, not hidden from people); only Carol's local note is invisible to her.
